assertions.description: audio.sch has 5 transistors: Q321/Q331 (MPF102 NJFET), Q931/Q921 (MMBFJ113 NJFET), Q301 (2N3906 PNP BJT). The transistor_circuits detector finds 0 entries. Likely due to empty pins on some of these components in the sub-sheet parse (12 components have empty pins in audio.sch).
